# Sanjib Das Portfolio

> Professional freelance graphic designer and AI ads creator based in Kolkata, West Bengal, India, specializing in high-converting AI UGC video ads, product creatives, YouTube thumbnails, and social media post designs for D2C brands, creators, and startups.

## Website

https://sanjibdas.vercel.app

## Services

- **AI UGC Ads:** Creator-style AI voiceover ads, scene-by-scene script direction, hooks, and overlays.
- **AI Product Ad Creatives:** Short product-focused video ad creatives optimized for Instagram Reels and Meta Ads.
- **YouTube Thumbnail Design:** Custom high-CTR thumbnail compositions to maximize video views and click-through rates.
- **Product Post Design:** E-commerce product visual mockups, social feed templates, and discount promo post designs.
- **Social Media Creatives:** High-impact campaign poster designs, launch flyers, and customer review posts.
- **D2C Brand Creatives:** Visual brand identity kits including core logos, color palettes, and profile assets.
